excerpt: The official programme page for MSc in Financial Technology lists 2nd round opening on 2025-09-01 and closing on 2025-11-17. Source: https://www.gs.cuhk.edu.hk/admissions/application-deadline 1st round: 6 October 2025 2nd round: 17 November 2025 3rd round: 29 December 2025 4th round: 26 February 2026 Applications will be processed on a rolling basis until all places have been filled. Therefore, early applications are strongly encouraged.
